official.description: A modern, accessible and composable Stepper component for React and Tailwind CSS. Built for shadcn/ui-style workflows with registry-first distribution.

official.name: @text-ui
official.description: A shadcn/ui registry with EchoText (`echo-text`): layered stroke text that follows the pointer—minimal setup, drop-in component.

official.name: @framecn
official.description: Beautiful videos, made simple. Ready to use, customizable video components for React.

official.name: @turbopills-ui
official.description: Beautiful, accessible, and customizable React components for your telehealth applications.

official.name: @nexus-labs
official.description: Motion-native animated components for Next.js — backgrounds, heroes, inputs, carousels, and more. Open source. Copy-ready TypeScript.

official.name: @wensity
official.description: Motion-rich React components for AI interfaces, SaaS blocks, and cinematic interactions. Free Wensity components only.
